title: AO Farms Dashboard UI — Phase 1 Shell

requirements.text: Implement a top navigation bar with the AO Farms logo (green cow head icon + 'A.O. Farms' text) on the left, and navigation links: Dashboard, Cattle, Milk Production, Inventory, Customers, Deliveries. The active link should use a filled dark-green pill/button style. Navigation should route to existing app routes.
acceptanceCriteria: Logo displays on the top-left with green cow icon and 'A.O. Farms' text
All 6 nav links are visible on desktop
Active route link is highlighted with a dark green filled style
Navigation links route to their respective pages

requirements.text: Add a full-width hero banner below the nav bar on the Dashboard page showing an illustrated farm landscape (barn, trees, mountains, sunrise sky) with the text 'Welcome to AO Farms' and subtitle 'Here's your dairy farm overview for today' overlaid on the left side of the image.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero banner spans full width of the page
Farm landscape illustration is rendered as the banner background
Title 'Welcome to AO Farms' and subtitle text are visible over the banner
A cow emoji or small cow icon appears next to the title

requirements.text: Display 6 summary stat cards on the Dashboard in a single row: (1) Total Cattle — count + active count subtext, (2) Today's Milk — total litres, (3) Inventory Items — total tracked items, (4) Low Stock — items below threshold of 10, (5) Today's Deliveries — logged today, (6) Missed Deliveries — not delivered today. Each card has a label, numeric value, subtext, and a small icon. Cards use a light beige/cream background with green icon accents.
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 stat cards are rendered in a responsive row
Each card shows label, value, subtext, and icon
Values are pulled from backend query hooks (cattle count, milk records, inventory, deliveries)
Low stock threshold is 10
Cards use cream/beige background matching farm theme

requirements.text: Add a '7-Day Milk Production' line/area chart on the Dashboard (left panel) showing daily milk totals for the last 7 days using existing MilkProductionTrendChart component or equivalent Recharts line chart.
acceptanceCriteria: Chart renders in the lower-left panel of the Dashboard
X-axis shows last 7 days
Y-axis shows milk volume in litres
Data comes from milk production records

requirements.text: Add a 'Recent Milk Entries' panel on the Dashboard (right panel) listing the most recent milk production log entries with cattle tag, date, and volume. Show an empty state if no records exist.
acceptanceCriteria: Panel appears in the lower-right of the Dashboard
Lists recent milk entries with cattle tag, date, and litres
Shows empty state message when no records exist
Displays at most 5–8 most recent entries

requirements.text: Apply a consistent farm-themed visual style across all pages: beige/cream (#f5f0e8 or similar) page background, dark green (#1a5c2a or similar) primary color for nav, buttons, and accents, warm white card backgrounds, earthy tones for text. Use the existing CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css where possible.
acceptanceCriteria: Page background is beige/cream
Navigation bar uses dark green background
Primary buttons and active states use dark green
Cards have warm white background
Typography uses earthy/dark tones

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Keep all Motoko logic in backend/main.mo — do not create additional backend files unless migration is needed
Do not change existing backend data models or CRUD endpoints

required: Illustrated farm landscape banner with red barn on left, green trees, rolling mountains, and warm sunrise sky in a flat/cartoon style (farm-hero-banner.dim_1400x300.png)
AO Farms logo: green cartoon cow head with horns inside a circular badge with 'A.O. Farms' text below in dark green on transparent background (ao-farms-logo.dim_120x80.png)
